title: Principal SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal SEO Specialist at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services:
Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services!
